queries.question: Show both scripts and editors where either has a deadline of 21.04.03.
queries.sql:
SELECT Scripts.Title as Name
FROM Scripts
WHERE Scripts.Deadline = "21.04.03"
UNION
SELECT Editors.Name
FROM Editors
WHERE Editors.Deadline = "21.04.03"

queries.question: Show me scripts and editors with a deadline of 21.04.03.
queries.sql:
SELECT Scripts.Title as Name
FROM Scripts
UNION
SELECT Editors.Name
FROM Editors
WHERE Editors.Deadline = "21.04.03"
